import pandas as pd
import regex as re
from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import CountVectorizer

def task_func(text):
    # Define a regular expression to split the input text into sentences
    sentence_regex = re.compile(r'[.\?\!]+')

    # Split the input text into sentences
    sentences = sentence_regex.split(text)

    # Remove empty sentences from the list
    sentences = [sentence for sentence in sentences if len(sentence.strip()) > 0]

    # Initialize CountVectorizer with lowercase and stop words removal
    vectorizer = CountVectorizer(lowercase=True, stop_words='english')

    # Transform the list of sentences into a document-term matrix using CountVectorizer
    doc_term_matrix = pd.DataFrame(vectorizer.fit_transform(sentences))

    # Adapt column names from vectorizer feature names
    doc_term_matrix.columns = vectorizer.get_feature_names()

    return tuple([doc_term_matrix])
